core_payload.content:
# N-Infinity Weaver

## 1. Future Role
Dream keeps Weaver as the next topology-scout layer above the current Jaccard merge-report runtime. The real capsule remains canonical for today's bounded weaving path; Dream only describes the future delta that could make resonance discovery more expressive without weakening graph law.

## 2. Future Delta
- stage richer soft-link and bridge-candidate hypotheses before they become merge proposals
- attach clearer confidence packaging, review bundles, and comparative rationale for candidate clusters
- distinguish duplicate pressure, bridge pressure, and contradiction pressure more precisely before routing work onward
- surface better handoffs into Parliament and Suggestion Agent when a cluster should be debated or converted into an advisory packet instead of merged
- improve topology scouting so isolated but adjacent capsules become legible without implying silent graph mutation

## 3. Why Keep Dream
Future graph depth will require more than bounded duplicate compaction. Weaver still needs a future doctrine for exploratory topology discovery, better review ergonomics, and calmer routing across merge, contradiction, and suggestion lanes.

## 4. Guardrails
Dream does not replace the current TypeScript weaving runtime, does not imply silent auto-link mutation, and does not restate today's live merge-report path as if it were still only aspirational doctrine.

neuro_concentrate.summary: N-Infinity Weaver in Dream now keeps only the future topology-scout delta above the current real-side runtime. Real remains canonical for the bounded Jaccard similarity scan, guarded merge candidate generation, contradiction-aware cleanup, and reviewable merge report that exist today. Dream instead preserves the next layer: richer soft-link and bridge-candidate staging, better confidence and review packaging, clearer routing between merge, contradiction, and suggestion lanes, and improved discovery of isolated but adjacent capsules. This keeps future exploratory graph intelligence visible without pretending the current governed weaving path is still merely aspirational.
